text:
The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum Adds Anya Taylor-Joy to Its Cast
The Queen's Gambit star Anya Taylor-Joy has joined the cast of The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum as a new elf character named Seren.

text:
Treyarch Head Mark Gordon Steps Down from Call of Duty Studio
Treyarch studio head Mark Gordon will be leaving the studio after 22 years.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Ninja Theory and Double Fine Also Reportedly Under Threat of Closure as Xbox Studios Fight for Survival
Hellblade developer Ninja Theory and Psychonauts developer Double Fine are reportedly among the studios fighting to avoid closure as Microsoft makes significant cuts to its Xbox business.

text:
Meccha Chameleon, the New Hide-and-Seek Paint Game, Reaches 2 Million Copies Sold
Viral hide-and-seek paint game Meccha Chameleon is celebrating 2 million copies sold with the launch of a new map later this week.

text:
Obsession Director Curry Barker Says He's in No Rush to Make Obsession 2
As Obsession continues to control the box office after its fifth weekend, director Curry Barker has confirmed he has no intention of moving on to a sequel too quickly.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Ubisoft Bids Farewell to Assassin's Creed Shadows With Final Story Update
The final Assassin's Creed Shadows content update will add one last chapter to the story of Naoe and Yasuke, a tough new challenge mode, and let you dress up as Edward Kenway from Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Final Fantasy Resonance Interview: The First HD-2D FF Was Conceptualized 6-7 Years Ago and Inspired by Final Fantasy V
Final Fantasy Resonance's producer and director talk with IGN about how Final Fantasy V and VI inspired this new game that adapts the Brave Exvius story for a new console-style turn-based RPG.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Sam’s Club Memberships Drop As Low as $15 for the First Year, but Not for Long
Both the Plus and Club Sam’s Club memberships have been discounted to $50 for the first year and $15 for the first year, respectively. This offer only lasts until July 5.

author: IGN RSS
text:
The First-Ever Official Studio Ghibli Store in the U.S. Is Opening Later This Month in Los Angeles
IGN can exclusively reveal that the official Studio Ghibli store, also known as Donguri Republic, is opening for the first time in the U.S. in Los Angeles on June 23. The shop will feature over 400 officially licensed products from such beloved films as My Neighbor Totoro, Kiki's Delivery Service, Spirited Away, Howl's Moving Castle, and more.
